amendatorysection.catchline: Law enforcement officer; judge; attorney; agents or employees; immunity.
amendatorysection.para: (a) Law enforcement officer has the same meaning as in section 81-1401; and
(b) Prohibited content has the same meaning as in section 25-21,304.
(2) There shall be no civil or criminal liability for the viewing or possession of prohibited content by:
(a) A judge who does so in good faith and for purposes of a proceeding before the court;
(b) An attorney who does so in good faith in the course of representing a client or potential client;
(c) An agent or employee of a judge or attorney who does so in good faith and for a legitimate purpose while acting within the scope of such agency or employment; or
(d) A law enforcement officer who does so in good faith in the course of his or her official duties.
